article.title: UBER OA what to expect?
article.content:
I’ve received the HackerRank assessment link for the Uber Online Assessment, which mentions 2 problems (1 intermediate and 1 advanced). 


I have two questions:

1. Is this OA camera-proctored?
1. What is the difficulty level of the questions, and which topics are primarily focused on?

If anyone has taken this assessment recently, please let me know — it would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance!

post.content: Hi, any idea if OA is camera-proctored?
